song.title: Glory to God on High
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Glory to God on high! Let praises fill the sky! Praise ye His name! He all our sorrows bore; Angels His name adore, And saints cry evermore, “Worthy the Lamb!”
[V2] 2) All they around the throne Cheerfully join in one, Praising His name: We who have known His blood Sealing our peace with God, Spread His dear name abroad; Worthy the Lamb!
[V3] 3) Join all the human race, Our Lord and God to bless, Praise ye His name! In Him we will rejoice, Making a cheerful noise, Saying with heart and voice, “Worthy the Lamb!”
[V4] 4) Though we must change our place, Our hearts shall never cease Praising His name: To Him we’ll tribute bring, Laud Him, our gracious King, And, without ceasing, sing, “Worthy the Lamb!”
song.author: James Allen
